TCGA Data Analysis

Load required library

library(data.table)
library(R.utils)
library(ICeDT)
library(ggcorrplot)

Read CIBERSORT cell fraction estimates. The output could be txt or csv format. Here we just double check that the results are the same from the two formats.

CBST_folder = "./CIBERSORT/CIBERSORTx_output"

cb_LM22    = read.csv(file.path(CBST_folder,"CIBERSORTx_LM22_Results.csv"))
cb_LM22_v2 = read.table(file.path(CBST_folder,"CIBERSORTx_LM22_Adjusted.txt"), 
                        header=TRUE, as.is=TRUE)
cb_SF2018  = read.csv(file.path(CBST_folder,"CIBERSORTx_SF2018_Results.csv"))
cb_SF2018_filtered = read.csv(file.path(CBST_folder, 
                     "CIBERSORTx_SF2018_filtered_cells_Results.csv"))
dim(cb_LM22)
## [1] 472  26
cb_LM22[1:2,c(1:2,23:26)]
dim(cb_LM22_v2)
## [1] 472  26
cb_LM22_v2[1:2,c(1:2,23:26)]
summary(c(data.matrix(cb_LM22[,-1])) - c(data.matrix(cb_LM22_v2[,-1])))
##    Min. 1st Qu.  Median    Mean 3rd Qu.    Max. 
##       0       0       0       0       0       0
dim(cb_SF2018)
## [1] 472  15
cb_SF2018_filtered[1:2,c(1:2,12:15)]
dim(cb_SF2018)
## [1] 472  15
cb_SF2018[1:2,c(1:2,12:15)]
summary(cb_LM22$Correlation)
##    Min. 1st Qu.  Median    Mean 3rd Qu.    Max. 
## 0.04305 0.39464 0.52841 0.51838 0.64473 0.88339
summary(cb_SF2018$Correlation)
##    Min. 1st Qu.  Median    Mean 3rd Qu.    Max. 
## 0.02738 0.26671 0.32687 0.32477 0.38604 0.60803
summary(cb_SF2018_filtered$Correlation)
##    Min. 1st Qu.  Median    Mean 3rd Qu.    Max. 
## 0.04606 0.32830 0.40401 0.39242 0.46318 0.62794

Boxplot of cell fraction for each cell type inferred using LM22 signature matrix in CIBERSORTx

par(mar=c(10,3,1,0.8), mgp=c(1.5,0.5,0), cex.axis=0.8, bty="n")
boxplot(cb_LM22[,2:23],las=2, 
        main="CIBERSORT cell proportion, LM22 signature matrix")

Boxplot of cell fraction for each cell type inferred using SF2018 signature matrix in CIBERSORTx

par(mar=c(8,3,1,0.8), mgp=c(1.5,0.5,0), cex.axis=0.8, bty="n")
boxplot(cb_SF2018[,2:12], las=2, 
        main="CIBERSORT cell proportion, SF2018 signature matrix")

Boxplot of cell fraction for each cell type inferred using SF2018_filtered_cells signature matrix in CIBERSORTx. Here filterd cells means using 200 cells with highest proportion of expressed genes per cell type.

par(mar=c(8,3,1,0.8), mgp=c(1.5,0.5,0), cex.axis=0.8, bty="n")
boxplot(cb_SF2018_filtered[,2:12], las=2, 
        main="CIBERSORT cell proportion, SF2018_few0 signature matrix")

Correlation plot compare cell fractions inferred using LM22 signature matrix and SF2018 signature matrix in CIBERSORTx
- For most of the cell types, we see the fractions inferred using different signature matrix correlated - Fractions of dendritic cell inferred using the 2 types of signature matrices have small correlation - The fractions three types of NK cells also showed some dubious correlation: such as correlation between NK1 and Macrophages.M0.

table(cb_LM22$Mixture == cb_SF2018$Mixture)
## 
## TRUE 
##  472
cb_LM22_mtrx   = data.matrix(cb_LM22[,2:23])
cb_SF2018_mtrx = data.matrix(cb_SF2018[,2:12])
cb_SF2018_filtered_mtrx = data.matrix(cb_SF2018_filtered[,2:12])

cormat_LM22_SF2018 = cor(cb_LM22_mtrx, cb_SF2018_mtrx, 
                         method = "spearman")
cormat_LM22_SF2018_filtered = cor(cb_LM22_mtrx, 
                                  cb_SF2018_filtered_mtrx, 
                         method = "spearman")

summary(c(cormat_LM22_SF2018))
##      Min.   1st Qu.    Median      Mean   3rd Qu.      Max. 
## -0.622789 -0.121628 -0.015125 -0.001872  0.111839  0.784402
summary(c(cormat_LM22_SF2018_filtered))
##      Min.   1st Qu.    Median      Mean   3rd Qu.      Max. 
## -0.619241 -0.129740 -0.008582 -0.002737  0.116529  0.571739
ggcorrplot(t(cormat_LM22_SF2018), tl.cex = 6) + 
  scale_fill_gradient2(limit = c(-0.8, 0.8), low = "blue", 
                       high =  "red", mid = "white") 

round(cormat_LM22_SF2018,2)
##                              B_cells CD4T_memory CD8T_B CD8T_G Dendritic_cells
## B.cells.naive                   0.43        0.32  -0.05   0.00           -0.03
## B.cells.memory                  0.18        0.13  -0.12   0.08           -0.04

## NK.cells.activated              0.11       -0.07   0.39  -0.28           -0.08

## Neutrophils                         -0.05  0.07
ggcorrplot(t(cormat_LM22_SF2018_filtered), tl.cex = 6) + 
    scale_fill_gradient2(limit = c(-0.8, 0.8), low = "blue", 
                       high =  "red", mid = "white") 

round(cormat_LM22_SF2018_filtered,2)

Correlation plot compare cell fractions inferred using SF2018 signature matrix and SF2018_filtered signature matrix in CIBERSORTx
- We saw positive correlation for the fraction of the same cell type inferred by the 2 different signature matrix.

cormat_SF2018 = cor(cb_SF2018_mtrx, cb_SF2018_filtered_mtrx, 
                         method = "spearman")

summary(c(cormat_SF2018))
##     Min.  1st Qu.   Median     Mean  3rd Qu.     Max. 
## -0.71256 -0.19495  0.01046  0.02219  0.18254  0.93162
ggcorrplot(t(cormat_SF2018), tl.cex = 6) 

par(mar=c(3,3,1,0.8), mgp=c(1.5,0.5,0), cex.axis=0.85, cex.lab=0.85, cex.main=0.85)
layout(matrix(c(1,2,3,4),nrow=2,ncol = 2,byrow = TRUE))

plot(cb_SF2018$CD8T_B, cb_LM22$T.cells.CD8, 
     xlab = "SF2018 CD8 B cell", ylab = "LM22 CD8 T cell")

plot(cb_SF2018$CD8T_G, cb_LM22$T.cells.CD8, 
     xlab = "SF2018 CD8 G cell", ylab = "LM22 CD8 T cell")

plot(cb_SF2018_filtered$CD8T_B, cb_LM22$T.cells.CD8, 
     xlab = "SF2018_few0 CD8 B cell", ylab = "LM22 CD8 T cell")

plot(cb_SF2018_filtered$CD8T_G, cb_LM22$T.cells.CD8, 
     xlab = "SF2018_few0 CD8 G cell", ylab = "LM22 CD8 T cell")

plot(cb_SF2018$CD8T_B, cb_SF2018$CD8T_G, 
     xlab = "SF2018 CD8 B cell", ylab = "SF2018 CD8 G cell")

plot(cb_SF2018_filtered$CD8T_B, cb_SF2018_filtered$CD8T_G, 
     xlab = "cb_SF2018_filtered CD8 B cell", 
     ylab = "cb_SF2018_filtered CD8 G cell")

gc()
##           used (Mb) gc trigger (Mb) limit (Mb) max used (Mb)
## Ncells  903020 48.3    1801207 96.2         NA  1236944 66.1
## Vcells 1697063 13.0    8388608 64.0      32768  2804395 21.4
